creator: gugod@gugod.ath.cx
text:
===>  Building for wanderlust-xemacs20-2.4.1
/usr/local/bin/xemacs-20.4 -batch -q -no-site-file -l /tmp/portswrk//usr/ports/mail/wanderlust-xemacs20/work/wanderlust-startup.el -l WL-MK -f compile-wl-package /usr/local/lib/xemacs/site-lisp NONE

XEmacs exiting.Cannot open load file: /usr/ports/mail/wanderlust-xemacs20/work/wanderlust-startup.el

I set WRKDIRPREFIX to /tmp/portswrk , so it should find
wanderlust-startup.el in this path : /tmp/portswrk/usr/portsmail/wanderlust-xemacs20/work/wanderlust-startup.el

How-To-Repeat: set WRKDIRPREFIX in /etc/make.conf and make build wanderlust.
